title: Wax Item Frames
description: Makes item frames wax-able like signs.
body:
Description

This mod lets you protect your item frames by making them waxable. Waxing an item frame will make its item completely fixed. You won't be able to remove it or rotate it until you unwax it.

Features

- Wax item frames by sneak + right-click with honeycomb. - Unwax item frames by sneak + right-click with an axe. If you come across any issues, post an issue on the github repo and I'll get to it as soon as I can.
